featured.question: Why did renewal risk increase for West Enterprise accounts this month and what should we do?
featured.answer: All 241 West Enterprise accounts remain at High or Critical risk with $441M in revenue at risk. The root cause is incident INC-0001, a 6-hour 47-minute platform reliability degradation on May 28, 2026, affecting 77% of the West Enterprise portfolio. The three primary risk drivers are: SLA Breach Spike (83 accounts), Product Usage Drop (80 accounts), and Negative Support Sentiment (78 accounts). Immediate churn threats include TechNova Solutions ($2.8M ARR, renewal July 31), NovaPay Financial ($3.6M ARR, July 15), and Acme Financial Services ($4.2M ARR, August 15). The CRO escalation memo estimates $14.8M in probability-weighted revenue at risk and projects a 72% save rate if you act immediately. Prioritized actions: Execute Renewal Save Play for 73 accounts with multi-year commitment incentives, launch Executive Outreach for 63 accounts, process Reliability Credit Review for 56 accounts using the $2.1M SLA credits budget, and deploy the 90-Day Reliability Proof Program for accounts with 60+ days to renewal.

toolCalls.sql: WITH __risk AS (SELECT risk_month, account_id, region, segment, renewal_risk_score, risk_tier, top_risk_driver, revenue_at_risk FROM SNOWFLAKE_REVENUE_CC.CORE.FACT_RENEWAL_RISK) SELECT risk.top_risk_driver, COUNT(DISTINCT risk.account_id) AS affected_accounts, AVG(risk.renewal_risk_score) AS avg_risk_score FROM __risk risk WHERE risk.region = 'West' AND risk.segment = 'Enterprise' AND risk.risk_month = DATE_TRUNC('MONTH', CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY risk.top_risk_driver ORDER BY affected_accounts DESC

toolCalls.query: West Enterprise accounts renewal risk churn incidents support issues SLA breaches

citations.title: INC-0001 Post-Incident Review: West Region Platform Reliability Degradation
citations.snippet: Incident INC-0001 was declared on 2026-05-28 at 14:32 UTC when monitoring detected sustained p99 latency spikes exceeding 4500ms on the West region primary compute cluster. Root cause traced to firmware defect in NVMe controllers.

citations.title: INC-0001 Customer Impact Assessment: West Enterprise Cohort
citations.snippet: Of 312 total West Enterprise accounts, 241 (77%) experienced measurable service degradation during the 6h47m incident window. Impact severity: 89 accounts experienced complete service unavailability.

citations.title: ESCALATION: West Enterprise Portfolio Risk - CRO Strategic Review
citations.snippet: EXECUTIVE ESCALATION - PORTFOLIO LEVEL. To: CRO, CFO, VP Sales West, VP Customer Success. Subject: West Enterprise renewal portfolio risk following INC-0001. Probability-weighted revenue at risk: $14.8M.

citations.title: CASE-88801: TechNova Solutions - Reliability Guarantee Request
citations.snippet: Customer: TechNova Solutions. Case opened by CTO directly to account executive. Issue: Customer requesting enhanced SLA with 99.99% uptime guarantee or evaluating competitive alternatives.

recommendations.rationale: CFO expressed intent to invoke termination clause at Q2 QBR; VP Engineering engagement required within 48 hours per 'Save Play: Executive Escalation Protocol for At-Risk Enterprise Accounts' (DOC-040).

CTO receiving competitive proposals with 99.99% SLA guarantees; 8-12% multi-year discount with enhanced SLA per 'Save Play: Multi-Year Commitment Incentive for At-Risk Renewals' (DOC-045). Renewal July 31.

Transaction processing SLA breach triggered penalty clause; immediate credit allocation from $2.1M budget per 'Save Play: Service Credit and Commercial Concession Framework' (DOC-041). Renewal July 15.

recommendations.play: Success Plan Reset for Post-Incident Recovery
recommendations.rationale: 14,000 claims required manual intervention during INC-0001; CIO demands structured recovery plan per 'Save Play: Success Plan Reset for Post-Incident Recovery' (DOC-043).
CTO requested detailed reliability roadmap at Q2 QBR; customer-visible uptime dashboard with failover demos per 'Save Play: 90-Day Reliability Proof Program' (DOC-073). Renewal in 90+ days.

CISO raised regulatory compliance concerns post-incident and is evaluating alternatives; deploy competitive defense positioning per 'Save Play: Competitive Displacement Defense for West Enterprise' (DOC-044).
